title: Tibs with Ethiopian Spices
description: A spicy beef stir-fry dish originating from Ethiopia. Tibs can be made with a variety of meats, but beef is a classic choice.
instructions: Heat oil in a large skillet over medium-high heat.
Add beef and cook until browned, about 3-4 minutes.
Remove beef from skillet and set aside.
Add onion and red bell pepper to skillet and cook until tender, about 5 minutes.
Add tibs spice mix and stir to combine.
Return beef to skillet and stir to combine with spice mix.
Add dark soy sauce and stir to combine.
Season with black pepper to taste.
Serve hot over rice or with injera bread.
